test_cases.title: Verify model fairness compliance and bias mitigation
steps: Trigger model training with provided datasets
Run fairness and bias assessment modules
Check compliance reports for adherence to regulatory standards
test_cases.expected_result: Model passes all fairness and bias compliance checks with no significant bias detected

test_cases.title: Validate data quality and availability for model training
steps: Verify completeness and accuracy of training datasets
Ensure no data corruption or missing values exist
test_cases.expected_result: Data sources are accessible and datasets meet quality standards required for training

test_cases.title: End-to-end loan approval prediction workflow test
steps: Submit a loan application with valid customer data
Verify loan approval decision is logged and returned
test_cases.expected_result: Loan approval prediction is processed correctly and response is as expected without errors

test_cases.title: Verify environment deployment and version consistency
steps: Check each environment (dev, test, staging, prod) for deployed model version
Compare deployed version against expected version
test_cases.expected_result: All environments have the expected model version deployed with no drift

test_cases.title: API load and performance test under expected peak loads
steps: Simulate loan prediction API requests at expected peak loads
Measure response times and error rates
Assess system performance against SLA criteria
test_cases.expected_result: Prediction API meets performance SLA requirements without failures under peak load

test_cases.title: Compliance validation on model explainability output
steps: Request explanation data for loan prediction decisions
Verify clarity and completeness of explanation per regulatory guidelines
test_cases.expected_result: Model explanations are generated and meet compliance and audit standards

results.failure_analysis: Loan approval API returned HTTP 500 error due to missing backend service configuration in test environment.
Deployment drift detected: deployed model version is 'none' instead of expected '1.2.5' in test environment.

triaged_defects.root_cause_hint: Potential data quality or model prediction consistency issue impacting loan decision accuracy; likely requires further data validation and model tuning.

defect_triage.release_risk_summary: Medium risk due to model bias, data quality concerns, and compliance adherence. All identified defects currently rated medium severity, requiring prompt resolution prior to release to ensure fairness and accuracy in loan approval predictions.
